summary: Contact form to admin panel integration testing completed. All features working correctly. Backend APIs (POST /api/contact, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/contact-messages) pass 100%. Frontend contact form submission and admin panel message management working as expected.

minor.issue: Fixed: HTTPException was not imported, causing 500 errors for validation failures

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Added HTTPException import to server.py for proper validation error handling
seed_data_creation: Test messages created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact form feature fully implemented and tested. All CRUD operations for contact messages work correctly. Admin panel shows messages with proper status badges and action buttons.

contact_form_submission.details: Form at /tr/iletisim submits successfully with name, email, subject (optional), and message fields

contact_form_validation.details: Backend returns 400 for missing required fields (name, email, message)

admin_messages_list.details: GET /api/admin/contact-messages returns paginated list with status filter

admin_message_detail.details: GET /api/admin/contact-messages/{id} returns message details and marks as read

admin_ui_messages_page.details: AdminContactMessages.js displays messages with status badges, filter dropdown, and pagination

admin_ui_message_modal.details: Detail modal shows sender info, message content, admin note textarea, and action buttons (Yanıtlandı, Arşivle, Sil)

sidebar_navigation.details: İletişim Mesajları link in sidebar with pending indicator (yellow dot)

auth_protection.details: Admin endpoints require authentication and admin role
